esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
// VM memory swapping: hypervisor swapping to disk — severe performance degradation
// Any non-zero value is critical; adjust threshold if needed for noise reduction
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.swapped IS NOT NULL AND vcenter.vm.memory.swapped > 0
| STATS swapped_mib = MAX(vcenter.vm.memory.swapped) BY vcenter.datacenter.name, vcenter.cluster.name, vcenter.host.name, vcenter.vm.name
| SORT swapped_mib DESC
| LIMIT 20
